objective: Complete WS-02 source and CI boundaries for streaming Hermes-derived Web, MCP Apps, AG-UI, remote MCP authorization, connector custody, and effective capability truth without allowing presentation or runtime surfaces to manufacture Manager authority.
success_criteria: Hermes text and activity stream to clients without avoidable Manager buffering; consequential execution remains Manager-authorized.
Remote protected MCP metadata, audience, PKCE, state, redirect, token custody, and staleness fail closed.
MCP Apps run in an opaque-origin sandbox and invoke only current assignment-scoped WorkActions through a mediated bridge.
AG-UI events are versioned, ordered, replayable, role-safe projections; client actions become authorized AMTECH commands.
Effective capability truth requires fresh runtime, dependency, credential, network, assignment, entitlement, connector, probe, and authority-version evidence.
Web, MCP Apps, AG-UI, Hermes, models, and connector payloads cannot select tools, scopes, hosts, credential modes, tokens, or authority versions.
Focused contracts, broad unit, production boundary, UI contracts, build, Hermes review, and Main Integration Gates pass on the exact head.
forbidden_files: Hermes image pin or upstream source
